---
title: "telemetry.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/gateway/routes/streams/telemetry.ts"
loc: 31
complexity: 3
logic_score: 5.82
style_score: 8.34
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 8.35
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)

## ⛩️ API Gateways
- `[GET] /telemetry`


## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [FastifyInstance](file://fastify)
- [Transform](file://stream)

### Exports
- `fastify`
- `fastify`
- `sseStream`
- `data`
- `onTelemetry`
- `canWrite`
